content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.bostonfed.org/publications/research-department-working-paper/2017/the-local-aggregate-effects-of-minimum-wage-increases.aspx", "source_title": "The Local Aggregate Effects of Minimum Wage Increases", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "The Local Aggregate Effects of Minimum Wage Increases As part of the Fair Labor Standards Act, the federal government introduced a national ...", "direct_quote": "The Local Aggregate Effects of Minimum Wage Increases As part of the Fair Labor Standards Act, the federal government introduced a national minimum wage in 1938.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Since then, it has raised the wage 22 times; the latest increase, in 2009, lifted it to $7.25 per hour.", "direct_quote": "Since then, it has raised the wage 22 times; the latest increase, in 2009, lifted it to $7.25 per hour.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In 2009 alone, 22 states raised their minimum wage, following 20 state-level increases in 2018.", "direct_quote": "In 2009 alone, 22 states raised their minimum wage, following 20 state-level increases in 2018.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
